instructorComments: Approach became unstable below 500 ft AGL. Student delayed go-around decision. Recommend remedial lesson on stabilized approach criteria.
staticNextStep: Review stabilized approach criteria with an instructor before the next pattern evaluation.

instructorComments: Maintained runway alignment late. Needs improved crosswind correction and earlier control input.
staticNextStep: Schedule supervised crosswind landing repetitions with explicit control-input review.

instructorComments: Good aircraft control. Radio calls need more confidence and standard phraseology.
staticNextStep: Continue standard phraseology practice during supervised local pattern work.

instructorComments: Maintained altitude and bank angle within standards. Ready for stage check review.
staticNextStep: Confirm stage check documentation and schedule instructor review.

instructorComments: Pattern spacing inconsistent. Continue supervised pattern work before solo readiness review.
staticNextStep: Continue supervised pattern work and reassess solo readiness with the assigned instructor.

instructorComments: Approach speed management needs improvement. Floating beyond touchdown zone.
staticNextStep: Practice short-field approach speed targets with instructor review before signoff.

instructorComments: Improving coordination. Needs more practice maintaining altitude and heading.
staticNextStep: Continue slow-flight practice with altitude and heading standards called out before each attempt.

instructorComments: Scenario handling was calm, but checklist flow slowed during simulated alternator failure. Continue timed checklist practice.
staticNextStep: Repeat emergency flow scenarios with emphasis on checklist callouts and task prioritization.

instructorComments: Recovery inputs were delayed and pitch attitude was inconsistent. Student needs a remedial review of recognition cues and recovery sequence.
staticNextStep: Schedule a supervised stall recovery lesson before advancing to solo readiness review.

instructorComments: Landing performance was within school standards. Airspeed control, touchdown point, and runway alignment were consistent.
staticNextStep: Prepare stage check paperwork and complete final oral review items.

instructorComments: Aircraft control remained stable, but readbacks were incomplete near class D entry. Needs more deliberate phraseology and airspace brief.
staticNextStep: Use radio script rehearsals and repeat towered airport pattern work with instructor prompting.

instructorComments: Pattern spacing is improving. Downwind altitude varied during configuration changes and should be stabilized earlier.
staticNextStep: Continue normal pattern repetitions with altitude gates called out before each leg.

instructorComments: Cross-country planning, diversion logic, and emergency checklist use were within standards. Ready for stage check scheduling.
staticNextStep: Confirm stage check slot and verify required endorsements are complete.

instructorComments: Roundout timing improved, but energy management on final remained inconsistent. Needs more work on power reduction timing.
staticNextStep: Repeat soft-field profiles with stabilized approach targets and power management callouts.

instructorComments: Bank angle control is improving. Student should continue scan discipline while maintaining altitude in both directions.
staticNextStep: Continue steep-turn repetitions with explicit rollout heading and altitude targets.

instructorComments: Student recognized unstable spacing but delayed the go-around call. Taxi briefing also needs stronger runway incursion awareness.
staticNextStep: Build a reviewed scenario plan for go-around triggers and airport surface movement procedures.

instructorComments: Route planning was organized, but fuel reserve calculations need instructor review before cross-country authorization.
staticNextStep: Review fuel planning assumptions and complete a corrected navigation log with instructor signoff.
